---
title: "Comparing"
subtitle: "The right tool for the job"
date: 2026-02-23
date-modified: last-modified
author:
  - name: Andy Corrigan
    orcid: 0000-0002-3896-2489
    email: cudl@lib.cam.ac.uk
    url: https://www.cdh.cam.ac.uk/about/people/andy-corrigan/
license: "CC BY-NC 4.0"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  pdf: default
  html: default
---
![](images/Labyriiinth-300x300.png){fig-alt="The Labyriiinth Icon"}  

## Learning Objective

Evaluate different IIIF tools in order to know how to identify the right tools to use.  

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}

## Key Tools and Concepts
Comparison tools, IIIF Manifest, Mirador Viewer, Compariscope, Allmaps

:::

## Summary

tools ,.. 

## Side-by-Side [Mirador]

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="500" src="https://projectmirador.org/demo/" title="Mirador Viewer Demo"></iframe>
```
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## **Exercise**

Add these two resources to the Mirador Viewer:
ʻAjāʼib al-makhlūqāt (MS Nn.3.74)
https://cudl.lib.cam.ac.uk//iiif/MS-NN-00003-00074

Nuremberg Chronicle (Inc.0.A.7.2[888])
https://cudl.lib.cam.ac.uk//iiif/PR-INC-00000-A-00007-00002-00888 

Turn thumbnail strip on...

On the first, find page '13r'
On the second, find page '5v'

Note one similarity, and one difference. 

Take a screenshot.

:::

## Layered [Compariscope]

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="600" src="https://vanda.github.io/iiif-features/compariscope.html?manifest=img/" title="The V&A Compariscope"></iframe>
```
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Exercise

Images to add:
1. https://images.lib.cam.ac.uk/iiif/MS-VANNECK-BOX-00005-A-FOLIO-00001-000-00005.jp2/full/full/0/default.jpg

2. https://images.lib.cam.ac.uk/iiif/MS-VANNECK-BOX-00005-A-FOLIO-00001-000-00008.jp2/full/full/0/default.jpg

3. https://images.lib.cam.ac.uk/iiif/MS-VANNECK-BOX-00005-A-FOLIO-00001-000-00010.jp2/full/full/0/default.jpg 

:::

## Geo-Spatial [Allmaps]

Next, your going to try geo-referencing a map so that you can compare it to current mapping data.

Tool called [Allmaps](https://editor.allmaps.org/)

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Exercise

Maps to add:
- https://cudl.lib.cam.ac.uk//iiif/PR-MAPS-BB-00053-00079-00001  
- https://cudl.lib.cam.ac.uk//iiif/PR-ATLAS-00004-00057-00003  
- https://cudl.lib.cam.ac.uk//iiif/MS-MAPS-MS-PLANS-00008  

Or try an aerial photo?
- https://cudl.lib.cam.ac.uk//iiif/PH-GEOGRAPHY-RC8GY-00021  

:::

## Exercise

::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
## To Do in Future

Under Construction.
:::
